args.description: Where is the EntityId to be found? in the INPUT args or in the OUTPUT object?

directives.description:
Intended to annotate mutations that have CDN page-cache implications

This directive will introspect mutation calls and invalidate Entities as stale when updated.
In turn, this may mark various web pages and api caches as stale for items that depend specifically on those entity ids.
directives.name: purgePageCache

directives.description: Exposes a URL that specifies the behaviour of this scalar.
directives.name: specifiedBy

inputFields.description:
Representing the amount of the event fee if a fee is charged for the event.
If the group is in the United States, this may not exceed 4999 (for any currency).
Otherwise, this may not exceed 1000000 (for any currency).
If the event fee is charged with WePay, this must be at least 1.0 USD
If not passed - default value '0' will be used.
inputFields.name: amount

inputFields.description:
String representing the currency for the event fee if a fee is charged for the event.
May be one of: AUD,BRL,CAD,CHF,EUR,GBP,INR,JPY,KRW,PLN,RUB,THB,TRY,USD
If not passed - default value 'USD' will be used.
inputFields.name: currency

inputFields.description: Early bird discount for the event.
inputFields.name: earlyBirdDiscount

inputFields.description:
Used only in the 'edit' flow, ignored in 'create'.
Pass 'false' to make venue free (fee amount = 0).
Other fields will be substituted by default values in this case.
inputFields.name: enabled

inputFields.description:
String representing the payment method for the event fee if a fee is charged for the event
If not passed - default value 'CASH' will be used.
inputFields.name: paymentMethod

inputFields.description: A list of promo codes for the event.
inputFields.name: promoCodes

inputFields.description: String setting the refund policy if the event has a fee. May not be longer than 250 characters.
inputFields.name: refundPolicy

Organizer-defined terms for refunds. If this is defined, you must provide the authenticated member a way to access this information before they can RSVP.
They will need to agree to these terms before they RSVP
See the following help article for more information on Meetup refund payment policies https://help.meetup.com/hc/en-us/articles/360004065471-Payment-Policies
fields.name: refundPolicy

A radius to filter groups outside the provided lat/lon. Default = 50 miles.

inputFields.name: timeDecayScale

An optional topicCategoryID [from topic taxonomy] to further filter down to Groups in a particular category only.
Used if categoryId is empty.

inputFields.name: useTimeOfDayEmbedding

inputFields.description: A visibility group. Default = all
inputFields.name: visibility

inputFields.description: An ISO date in the form `YYYY-MM-DD` or `2011-12-03`
inputFields.name: endDate

fields.description: This member's answer to the event RSVP question
fields.name: answer

fields.description: The number of guests the member has for this event
fields.name: guestsCount

fields.description: Indicator that this RSVP is the first RSVP for member associated with the RSVP
fields.name: isFirstEvent

fields.description: Indicator that the member associated with this RSVP is a host for this event
fields.name: isHost

fields.description: Membership associated with the RSVP. This may be absent for former members
fields.name: membership

fields.description:
The current event payment status for the RSVP for ticketed events from the perspective of the provided memberId.
A payment status is only available if the RSVP belongs to the calling member or if
the calling member has permission to manage money within the hosting group.
fields.name: payStatus

fields.description: time this RSVP was last updated
fields.name: updated

fields.description: May be null for physical (in-person) events
fields.name: venue

fields.description: total overall count of members marked as absent
fields.name: absentCount

fields.description: total overall count of members marked as attended
fields.name: attendedCount

fields.description: total overall count of no RSVPS
fields.name: noCount

fields.description: total overall count of members marked as a no show
fields.name: noShowCount

fields.description: total overall count of RSVPs based on requested RSVP statuses
fields.name: totalCount

fields.description: total overall count of waitlisted RSVPS
fields.name: waitlistCount

fields.description: total overall count of yes RSVPS
fields.name: yesCount

inputFields.description: The status of the Event associated with the RSVP. defaults to all RsvpEventStatuses
inputFields.name: eventStatus

inputFields.description: An optional group id to filter on
inputFields.name: groupId

inputFields.description:
Optional indicator to only include rsvps associated with hosts.
defaults to false.
inputFields.name: onlyHosts

inputFields.description:
Optional indicator to only include rsvps for members bringing guests.
defaults to false.
inputFields.name: onlyWithGuests

inputFields.description:
Optional indicator to only include rsvps for members who are
potential member connection candidates
inputFields.name: potentialMemberConnections

inputFields.description:
The status of the RSVP. defaults to YES and ATTENDED.
A filter containing HAVENT will only returned HAVENT responses, irrespective to other RsvpStatus included.
inputFields.name: rsvpStatus

inputFields.description:
Currently only supported by Member.Rsvps() query
NOTE: This will only be used if no cursor is provided.
      It is intended to be used on the first request.
inputFields.name: startDate

inputFields.description: An optional venueId to perform filtering by attending in-person or online
inputFields.name: venueId

inputFields.description: The name of the member
inputFields.name: query

inputFields.description: An optional list of RSVP statuses to preform secondary filtering on
inputFields.name: status

inputFields.description: An optional venueId to perform filtering by attending in-person or online
inputFields.name: venueId

inputFields.description: Positive integer representing the number of guests that members may include in their RSVP, 0 inclusive. This defaults to 2.
inputFields.name: guestLimit

inputFields.description:
Duration, Should be according to the ISO 8601 duration specified format
  
To remove the RSVP close time from an existing event, set rsvpCloseDuration to PT0S
inputFields.name: rsvpCloseDuration

inputFields.description:
Field representing the time before which members
will be allowed to RSVP to the event in milliseconds since the epoch.
This can only be set if there is a start time for the event.
This defaults to no RSVP close time restriction.
  
To remove the RSVP close time from an existing event, set rsvpCloseDuration to PT0S
inputFields.name: rsvpCloseTime

inputFields.description:
Positive integer representing total number of RSVP slots available for the event.
When undefined or defined as 0, there will be no set limit.
  
To remove the RSVP limit from an existing event, provide a value of 0
inputFields.name: rsvpLimit

inputFields.description:
Duration, Should be according to the ISO 8601 duration specified format
  
To remove the RSVP open time from an existing event, set rsvpOpenDuration to PT0S
inputFields.name: rsvpOpenDuration

inputFields.description:
Field representing the time after which members
will be allowed to RSVP to the event in milliseconds since the epoch.
This can only be set if there is a start time for the event.
This defaults to no RSVP open time restriction.
  
To remove the RSVP open time from an existing event, set rsvpOpenDuration to PT0S
inputFields.name: rsvpOpenTime

inputFields.description: Order placing hosts first, followed by the provided or default sorting
inputFields.name: hostsFirst

inputFields.description: Order placing pending member connections awaiting the authenticated member first, if they are a subscriber, followed by the provided or default sorting
inputFields.name: memberConnectionsFirst

inputFields.description: The field to sort on. Defaults to RsvpSortField.RSVP_ID
inputFields.name: sortField

inputFields.description: The direction of sort. Defaults to SortOrder.ASC
inputFields.name: sortOrder

enumValues.description:
In the case of member.rsvps, the normalized time of the event
In the case of event.rsvps, the rsvp's updated time
enumValues.name: DATETIME

enumValues.description:
In the case of member.rsvps, the local time of the event according to the hosting groups timezone
In the case of event.rsvps the same as DATETIME
enumValues.name: LOCAL_TIME

enumValues.description: The name of member rsvping
enumValues.name: NAME

enumValues.description: What's relevant to most members, you typically want pair this with SortOrder.DESC
enumValues.name: RELEVANCE

enumValues.description: The unique id associated with the rsvp
enumValues.name: RSVP_ID

enumValues.description: Number of shared groups in common with a given member, you typically want pair this with SortOrder.DESC
enumValues.name: SHARED_GROUPS

enumValues.description: An organizer confirmed attendance
enumValues.name: ATTENDED

enumValues.description: A organizer confirmed absence
enumValues.name: EXCUSED_ABSENCE

enumValues.description: An unresponded to RSVP
enumValues.name: HAVENT

enumValues.description: No longer supported
enumValues.name: MAYBE

enumValues.description: A member's response expressing they won't attend
enumValues.name: NO

enumValues.description: An organized flagged RSVP for a member that was expected to attend but didn't
enumValues.name: NO_SHOW

enumValues.description: A member's response expressing an intent to attend to an over capacity event
enumValues.name: WAITLIST

enumValues.description: A member's response expressing an intent to attend
enumValues.name: YES

enumValues.description: A member's expressed intent to go to an paid event before payment has been processed
enumValues.name: YES_PENDING_PAYMENT

types.description: A GraphQL Introspection defines the capabilities of a GraphQL server. It exposes all available types and directives on the server, the entry points for query, mutation, and subscription operations.

fields.description: The type that query operations will be rooted at.

fields.name: mutationType

fields.description: 'A list of all directives supported by this server.
fields.name: directives

fields.name: isOneOf

fields.deprecationReason: This legacy name has been replaced by `specifiedByURL`

types.description: An enum describing what kind of type a given __Type is

enumValues.description: Indicates this type is a scalar. 'specifiedByURL' is a valid field
enumValues.name: SCALAR

enumValues.description: Indicates this type is an object. `fields` and `interfaces` are valid fields.
enumValues.name: OBJECT

enumValues.description: Indicates this type is an interface. `fields` and `possibleTypes` are valid fields.
enumValues.name: INTERFACE

enumValues.description: Indicates this type is a union. `possibleTypes` is a valid field.
enumValues.name: UNION

enumValues.description: Indicates this type is an enum. `enumValues` is a valid field.
enumValues.name: ENUM

enumValues.description: Indicates this type is an input object. `inputFields` is a valid field.
enumValues.name: INPUT_OBJECT

enumValues.description: Indicates this type is a list. `ofType` is a valid field.
enumValues.name: LIST

enumValues.description: Indicates this type is a non-null. `ofType` is a valid field.
enumValues.name: NON_NULL
